ogTitle: Dum Dum vs Dumaresq Island: Climate Safety

heading: Dum Dum vs Dumaresq Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dum Dum, New South Wales and Dumaresq Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dum Dum has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Dumaresq Island (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dum Dum or Dumaresq Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dum Dum has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Dumaresq Island scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dum Dum scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Dumaresq Island scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dum Dum or Dumaresq Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dum Dum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
